prompt: Design a manga-style romantic comedy page following the comic page flow diagram. The story shows two high school students awkwardly confessing their feelings during a school festival, leading to sweet and funny moments.
prompt_refined: Generate a manga-style romantic comedy comic page. The page layout must strictly adhere to the 3x3 panel grid and right-to-left, top-to-bottom reading flow explicitly illustrated in image 1. The panels should sequentially depict a story featuring two high school students during a lively school festival, as they navigate an awkward confession of feelings. The narrative should progressively unfold across the page, capturing a series of sweet and funny moments stemming from their confession.
objects: school festival elements (e.g., stalls, decorations, crowds)
visual portrayal of an awkward confession
